upasargachandrika.example_text: 'rAdDiH prAptiH samAptiH' (aTarva0 11922)
prepsitasya PalasyADigamaH prAptiriti sAyaRaH
'kva prepsantI yuvatI virUpe' (aTarva0 1076) kva prepsantI kiM sTAnamAptumicCantI (=icCantyO) ityarTaH
'virAwasya raTAnIkaM matsyasyAmitraGAtinaH prepsantaM samare droRaM ke vIrAH paryavArayan' (BA0 droRa0 1071).. prepsantam AsAdayitum icCantam ityarTaH

'aprApya nadIM parvataH sTitaH' 'parAvarayoge ca' (pA0 3420)  ityasyodAharaRam atra prAptirbOdDikI na vAstavI nadIto'varasmin pradeSe parvataH sTita ityarTaH pareRa pUrvasya yogo gamyate paranadIyogena parvato viSezyate
nAsikASabdaSca nasaM prApnoti nas-rUpAM parivfttim Apnoti nAsikAyA nas ityAdeSo BavatItyarTaH

'kiM kriyABiriti prepsA vA' (ni0 632) prepsA kalpanA Bavati prakfte kIkawA iti kiNkftA ityevaM nirucyatAM kiM kriyABiriti veti yAskasyABisanDiH durgastvatra itiprepsA ityEkapadyamaBimanyate evamaBiprAyA nAstikA iti cArTApayate

'kva prepsandIpyate UrDvo agniH kva prepsanpavate mAtariSvA' (aTarva0 1074) prepsan tvaramARaH tvarayA gacCan prepsA tvarA paryarTe praSabdaH prepsan prAptumicCan iti vA prepsannityuktaH tatra kimicCanniti noktamiti sAvaSezaM vacaH sa dozaH

'tatra lokAntsamApnoti ye divyA ye ca pArTivAH' (aTarva॰9.5.15)

'deyaM cOrahftaM dravyaM rAjYA jAnapadAya tu adadadDi samavApnoti kilbizaM yasya tasya tat' (yAjYa॰2.36).. ukto'rTaH
